name: Lighthouse Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can (3 oz) Sliced ripe olives, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni on the conventional range.
2. Meanwhile, crumble ground beef into a dishwasher-safe plastic colander suspended over a 3-quart casserole dish.
3. Top with chopped onion. Stirring midway through cooking, microwave on high for 8 to 10 minutes or until meat is no longer pink. Discard grease and transfer meat to the casserole.
4. Stir in beans, corn, tomato sauce, chili sauce, mushrooms, and olives.
5. Drain macaroni and stir meat mixture into it.
6. Divide macaroni mixture into desired size casseroles for serving or freezing. Makes 3 - 2 quart casseroles (6 servings each).
